Title: Soundtrack to a Coup d'Etat
Actors: Patrice Lumumba, Dag Hammarskjöld, Louis Armstrong
Plot: Jazz and decolonization are entwined in this historical rollercoaster that rewrites the Cold War episode that led musicians Abbey Lincoln and Max Roach to crash the UN Security Council in protest against the murder of Patrice Lumu...
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 17 wins & 35 nominations total
